<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This workspace generates a professionally formatted PDF contract for a German medical practice's public representation. Keep text as plain UTF-8, no code blocks. Output goes to out/Vertrag_Oeffentlichkeitsarbeit_Arztpraxis.pdf.
